sleep.definition_english: A condition of body and mind which typically recurs for several hours every night, in which the nervous system is relatively inactive, the eyes closed, the postural muscles relaxed, and consciousness practically suspended.
sleep.mnemonic: SLEEP is like a peaceful island.

bail.definition_english: Money that is paid to a court to allow a person accused of a crime to be free until their trial.
bail.mnemonic: You need BAIL money to get out of jail.
